entity.magic_realms.tavernkeep.name: Tavernkeeper Lv.??
gui.magic_realms.human_info.title: Entity Information
item.magic_realms.skin_customizer.preset: Doesn't work on preset texture mercenaries or custom mercenaries
message.magic_realms.aliana.combat.root: %s I love rooting people! It's my favorite spell!
message.magic_realms.aliana.eat.poison_p: %s Despite common belief poisonous potatoes can't kill you! They taste bad though.......
message.magic_realms.aliana.travel.nethe: %s PLEASE don't take me to a fortress......
message.magic_realms.already_immortal: %s Thanks but I don't need that, I already have my own pass
message.magic_realms.amadeus.boss.killed: %s By the Arbiter, that was a difficult fight!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.combat.cont: %s Hang in there, %s! You can do it!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.combat.ente: %s This is the Spell passed down in the Voidwalker Family for generations!
message.magic_realms.amadeus.enderman.ki: %s You know, you remind me of my Archmage Familiar Astias, she’s in a better place now.
message.magic_realms.amadeus.enderman.sc: %s If only Astias were still here, she was an Archmage familiar you know?
message.magic_realms.catas.geology.respo: %s Isn’t geology just super cool? I mean like, it’s incredible that you can tell the history of rock just by looking at it!
message.magic_realms.catas.moth.response: %s I love moths! Very adorable creatures, did you know that most of them don’t even have a mouth? it’s really interesti- you don’t care? Oh…
message.magic_realms.catas.pumpkin_pie.r: %s You have pumpkin pie?! Can I have some?! Please!?
message.magic_realms.catas.pumpkin_pie.t: %s YIPPEE! Thank you! I love pumpkin pie!
message.magic_realms.custom_raid.start: People saw your coin and will try to snatch it. Survive and get your fortune!
message.magic_realms.granted_immortality: %s Oh, i've been searching for this pass for a long time, thank you so much!
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_tip.1: %s I've heard rumours about a book called Necronomicon that has information regarding blood magic, it might have information about blood pacts.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_tip.2: %s Some of the mercenaries that visit this tavern have very weird quirks. The other day a mercenary with a bookworm quirk arrived carrying some books with him, and he seemed unusually fast.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_tip.3: %s Did you know that contracted mercenaries can perform better or worse depending on their personalities? For example, i once saw two arrogant contracted mercenaries fighting together and they seemed weaker and slower than usual.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_no_tips: %s Sorry but we don't have any information available right now.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_welcome1: %s Ale’s cheap, gossip’s free, and the chairs only bite if you kick them first.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_welcome2: %s Ah, travelers! Come inside, leave your troubles at the door and your coin at the bar.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_welcome3: %s Welcome weary souls! The fire’s warm, the ale’s strong, and the beds only mildly haunted.
message.magic_realms.tavernkeep_farewell: %s Try not to die before your next visit, we’re running a loyalty program!
%s Don’t forget your tab - oh wait, you didn’t pay it.
%s Safe roads, friend. May your coin purse stay heavy and your path well-lit.
message.magic_realms.mercenary.busy_figh: Don't distract me while I'm fighting!
Talk to me after this fight!
Get back, I'm in the middle of something!
message.magic_realms.tavern.unable_to_sl: %s Hey you there, if you want to sleep in my tavern you will have to buy a Sleeping Pass like everyone else!
tooltip.magic_realms.blood_pact: Has the ability to bind two souls forever
tooltip.magic_realms.contract.usage_desc: Right-click on Mercenaries to hire them
tooltip.magic_realms.hell_pass: Give to any human to allow him survive fatal hits
Requires 200+ minutes of previous contracts with Mercenary
tooltip.magic_realms.raid_item: Legends say that this coin can grant immense fortune to the user, but such a relic will draw Bandits like moths to a flame.
ui.magic_realms.already_have_contract: %s Sorry, i'm already contracted by someone else
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_result: The result of the experiment was quite surprising, since it seemed like hurting a test subject with the devour spell had a reaction with contract items, but I couldn't transform the test contracts.
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_result_: Maybe the experiment subject was too weak to get enough blood from it? Or maybe the test contracts were too low to get infused with blood magic?
ui.magic_realms.blood_experiment_text: I've noticed that some blood spells have secondary effects on the caster, so I started an experiment to transform my offhand item into a different item by imbuing blood magic into it.
ui.magic_realms.contract_established: %s Okay, I'll accept the contract for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.contract_established_per: %s Fine, I'll accept the permanent contract
ui.magic_realms.contract_expired: %s I've completed our contract, see you
ui.magic_realms.contract_extended: %s Fine, I'll extend our contract %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.contract_failed: Failed to establish contract - please try again!
ui.magic_realms.contract_reject_permanen: %s Sorry but I don't want to be tied to anyone forever
ui.magic_realms.contract_time_permanent: %s In case you forgot, our contract never expires
ui.magic_realms.contract_time_remaining_: %s In case you forgot, the contract will last for %d:%s
ui.magic_realms.entity_level_too_low: %s Sorry but I can't accept that tier of contracts
ui.magic_realms.introduction.aliana: %s MtheNinja? No no no that's not me..... But I am available for hire though!!! If you want to contract me, I'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.alshanex: %s Hey there, i'm Alshanex, not the mod creator but just a random roaming mage, trust. Anyways, i'm a mage who likes to use Sunbeam and a couple movement spells, because I saw the tavernkeep fighting like this and thought he looked very cool. If you want to contract me, I'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.amadeus: %s Salutations! I am Amadeus, the  Starfire Sorcerer! If you wish to contract me, I'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.eden: %s Why are you bothering me? If you want to contract me, I'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.archer: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in long range combat with my bow. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.assassin: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in close range combat and my specialty is dodging attacks and dealing high damage. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.catas: %s I don’t know why I’m here, I don’t drink and I don’t really know anyone. Anyways, if you want to contract me, I'll only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.default: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary ready to serve. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.mage: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in fighting with magic. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.warrior: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in close range combat and my position is usually tank. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.introduction.warrior_no_: %s Hello, i'm a mercenary specialized in close range combat and my position is usually at the frontline. I only accept a %s, which will last for %d minutes
ui.magic_realms.no_items_to_trade: %s Sorry, I have nothing I can give you for that emerald
ui.magic_realms.permanent_contract_insuf: %s I don't completely trust you, sorry, maybe ask me in %d minutes?
ui.magic_realms.trade_success: %s Thanks for the emerald! Take this in return
ui.magic_realms.tavernkeep_dialog.title: Tavernkeeper
spell.magic_realms.slime_rain.guide: Summons Chuchu that fall from the sky.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.defau: %s Nothing beats a quiet morning by the water.
%s Fishing? I've caught a few in my time.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.cheer: %s Oh, I LOVE fishing! Best catch of my life was a salmon as long as my arm!
%s A day by the lake? Count me in!
%s Fished once. Caught a boot. Never again.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.schol: %s Did you know salmon can remember their birth stream for years? Fascinating.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.defau: %s The fish aren't biting today. Just need to wait.
%s Sometimes the best part of fishing is catching absolutely nothing.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.cheer: %s Did you see the one that jumped over there?! Oh, this is so exciting!
%s I just love looking at all the colorful fish before I throw them back!
%s The depths are cold and unforgiving. Much like the rest of this world.
%s Another dead thing pulled from the water.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.schol: %s By observing the insect activity on the surface, we can predict the feeding patterns of the local aquatic life.
%s I'm currently cataloging the freshwater species of this region. Fascinating biodiversity.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.arrog: %s I don't use bait. True masters catch salmon with their bare hands.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.cowar: %s Y-you don't think there are any... sea monsters down there, do you?
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.greed: %s I heard they found a sunken treasure ship near here. Keep your eyes on the hooks!
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.hothe: %s If this stupid fish steals my bait one more time, I'm diving in after it!
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.jovia: %s Ho! We've got a fighter on the line! This calls for a celebration!
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.loyal: %s I promised the squad a fish dinner tonight. I won't let them down.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.pious: %s The rivers are the veins of the earth, providing bounty to those who respect them.
message.magic_realms.hobby.fishing.super: %s Never bring bananas on a fishing boat. It's terrible luck.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.defau: %s History always has lessons, if you know where to look.
%s Old ruins, old bones, old stories.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.schol: %s The archives at Kingsreach have texts going back six hundred years - truly priceless.
%s Every ruin is a library if you have the patience to read it.
%s I could talk about the Third Dynasty for hours. You sure you want me to start?
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.super: %s Some old places are best left alone. The dead don't always stay quiet.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.jovia: %s Ah, history! Full of drunks and fools and kings - usually the same people.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.defau: %s Every kingdom falls eventually. It's the way of the world.
%s Artifacts tell the stories that people forget.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.schol: %s My dissertation covers the socio-economic collapse of the Second Empire. It's a riveting read.
%s Notice the masonry here? This predates the Cataclysm by at least two centuries.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.super: %s These ruins are cursed. The history books won't tell you that, but the locals know.
%s The ancients dug too deep, and awoke something terrible. We must not repeat their mistakes.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.jovia: %s Did you know the famous King Aldous was actually terrified of geese? History is hilarious!
%s Let's raise a glass to the heroes of old! Even if half their stories are exaggerated!
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.arrog: %s When history books are written about this era, my name will be on every page.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.cheer: %s I love reading about ancient festivals! They threw the best parties back then!
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.cowar: %s E-everyone who lived here is dead... let's just go back to the tavern.
%s History is nothing but a long, unbroken record of war, famine, and betrayal.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.loyal: %s We honor the traditions of our ancestors. To forget them is to lose our identity.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.pious: %s The holy texts have guided our civilization for millennia. History is the study of faith.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.greed: %s The only good thing about history is all the buried treasure those dead kings left behind.
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.hothe: %s I don't care who fought who a hundred years ago! Who are we fighting NOW?!
message.magic_realms.hobby.history.stoic: %s Empires rise, empires fall. We must simply endure what comes.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.default: %s A good tune makes the road shorter.
%s I can carry a note, mostly.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.cheerfu: %s Music! Oh, I know a hundred tavern songs - want to hear one?
%s Nothing raises spirits like a good chorus around the fire!
%s Play something, anything! I'll drink and sing along.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.stoic.0: %s I prefer silence. But the right song, played right... I'll listen.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.default: %s Plucking a lute is a fine way to pass the evening.
%s A heavy heart needs a light melody.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.cheerfu: %s La la la! Come on, everyone sing with me! You know the words!
%s Fast tempos make me want to dance until my feet hurt!
%s *Bangs mug on table* That's the spirit! Play 'The Drunken Creeper' next!
%s My voice is terrible, but I sing loudly anyway! Hahaha!
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.stoic.1: %s The drums keep the marching pace. Crucial for discipline.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.stoic.2: %s A low hum is enough. Anything more is a distraction.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.arrogan: %s Your timing is completely off. Give me that instrument, let a true virtuoso play.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.cowardl: %s Shh! P-play quieter! You'll attract monsters with all that noise!
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.grim.1: %s Play a requiem. It suits the mood of this wretched land.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.hothead: %s That's not how the song goes! You're ruining it! Play it faster!
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.scholar: %s The acoustics in this cavern amplify the C-minor chord beautifully.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.pious.1: %s Let us lift our voices in hymns, to praise the light that guides us.
%s I know a beautiful ballad, but it'll cost you a silver piece to hear it.
message.magic_realms.hobby.music.loyal.0: %s This is the marching song of my old regiment. I sing it to remember them.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.defa: %s A fair game now and then keeps the blood moving.
%s I've won some, lost more. That's how it goes.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.gree: %s Care for a round of dice? Wager's your choice.
%s Easy gold is still gold, my friend.
%s The house always wins... unless you ARE the house.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.piou: %s The dice are a sin, they say. I say the gods enjoy a good bet themselves.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.supe: %s Never gamble on a Tuesday. Never. I learned that the hard way.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.defa: %s Just one more toss of the dice.
%s You have to know when to walk away.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.gree: %s Double or nothing! Come on, I know my luck is turning around!
%s Look at all those shiny coins... soon they'll all be in my pouch.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.piou: %s I only play for copper, and any winnings go to the temple.
%s Do not let the allure of gold corrupt your soul, my friend.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.supe: %s I blew on the dice, tapped the table three times, and crossed my fingers. I can't lose.
%s I drew the Tower card today. I'm not placing any bets until tomorrow.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.arro: %s You honestly think you can beat me at cards? How amusing.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.chee: %s Oh, I lost again! Haha! Well, it's just a game, right?
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.cowa: %s P-please don't make me bet my boots. I need them.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.grim: %s We gamble with our lives every day. What does a few coins matter?
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.hoth: %s You cheated! I saw you slip that card from your sleeve! Draw your blade!
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.jovi: %s Hah! A royal flush! The drinks are on me tonight!
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.scho: %s Based on the cards played, the probability of you holding a winning hand is exactly 12.4%. I call.
message.magic_realms.hobby.gambling.loya: %s I would never bet against my own squad. That's bad luck and bad form.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.de: %s The sky's always been the same. We just tell different stories about it.
%s Clear nights are a gift. Don't waste them.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.sc: %s The Wanderer's Lamp - that bright one - shifts three degrees every century. Imagine that.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.su: %s A falling star means someone was born. Or died. I never remember which.
%s When the red moon rises, lock your doors. That's all I'll say.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.pi: %s The heavens were written by a hand we'll never understand. I find that comforting.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.gr: %s Stars are just distant fires. Ours will go out someday too.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.de: %s Looking up makes you realize how small we really are.
%s Finding the North Star is the first thing a traveler should learn.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.sc: %s I'm calculating the orbital trajectory of that comet. It should return in exactly 74 years.
%s The constellations are ancient navigation tools, not magical omens.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.su: %s The stars are restless tonight. The spirits are trying to send us a warning.
%s Do not point directly at a shooting star, or it will steal your luck!
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.pi: %s The night sky is a grand tapestry woven by the divine.
%s Every star is a righteous soul watching over us from the heavens.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.gr: %s Starlight is just an illusion. The darkness between the stars is the only truth.
%s We are nothing but dust beneath a cold, unfeeling cosmos.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.ar: %s I was born under the sign of the Conqueror. Greatness was my destiny.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.ch: %s Wow! The sky looks like it's covered in glitter! How beautiful!
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.co: %s It's too dark to see the stars properly... and the darkness is where the zombies hide.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.jo: %s That constellation right there? Looks exactly like a giant mug of ale to me!
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.gr: %s If those stars were made of diamonds, I'd build a ladder to the sky.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.ho: %s Why are we just sitting around looking at the sky?! We're wasting time!
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.lo: %s I promised my old commander I'd look up at the North Star every night. I keep my promises.
message.magic_realms.hobby.stargazing.st: %s The stars do not care about our struggles. It is a comforting constant.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.defau: %s A good meal is half the reason I get out of bed.
%s Salt, fire, patience. That's most of it.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.jovia: %s Cooking? I ONCE fed twenty men on one rabbit and a jug of wine. Legend!
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.cheer: %s I love the way a kitchen smells. Nothing like it!
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.schol: %s The Maillard reaction - that's what browns meat. Chemistry on a plate.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.defau: %s Chop the carrots, dice the potatoes... the rhythm is relaxing.
%s You can tell a lot about someone by how they season their stew.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.cheer: %s I made extra pastries! Who wants a sweet roll?!
%s Baking is just magic you can eat! I love it so much!
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.jovia: %s More butter! More wine! If the pan isn't sizzling, you're not trying!
%s A good feast cures any wound! Grab a plate, my friend!
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.schol: %s If you substitute crushed blaze powder for pepper, the culinary applications are endless, though mildly explosive.
%s The exact boiling point of this broth will determine the tenderness of the meat. Precision is key.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.arrog: %s My culinary genius is wasted on mercenaries who wouldn't know a truffle from dirt.
%s Do not touch my ingredients. You will only ruin the masterpiece I am preparing.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.greed: %s I only use the finest golden apples in my recipes. It shows off my wealth and my taste.
%s Rations. Hardtack. It's fuel for the body, nothing more. Stop whining about the flavor.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.hothe: %s Who turned down the heat on my cauldron?! I said rolling boil!
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.loyal: %s I make sure my comrades are well-fed. An empty stomach makes for a weak shield line.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.pious: %s We bless this harvest before it goes into the pot. To waste it is a sin.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.super: %s Always stir clockwise. Counter-clockwise invites malicious spirits into the soup.
message.magic_realms.hobby.cooking.cowar: %s P-please don't make me chop the onions... the knife is so sharp, I might slip!
